name: Macaroni & Cheese
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cheddar or American cheese; shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook elbow macaroni according to package directions for 7 minutes, then drain.
2. Set aside.
3. In a pan, melt butter or margarine and add flour, stirring continually until smooth.
4. Slowly add milk, stirring continually, and continue to stir until the mixture is smooth.
5. Gradually add 1 cup of shredded cheese, stirring continually.
6. Continue to stir and cook the mixture until it just thickens.
7. Add chopped onions, mustard, and green bell pepper; stir gently.
8. Arrange macaroni in a buttered baking dish (2 1/2 or 3-quart).
9. Pour the mixture over the macaroni.
10. Spread the remaining cup of shredded cheese evenly on top.
11. Sprinkle paprika on top.
12. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 30 minutes. If desired, add 2 cups of cooked, cubed ham to the mixture before pouring it over the macaroni.
